calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Writ Of Mandamus Pursuant To Ccp Sec 1094.5
Off Calendar Oct-03-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (in court):

Michael S. Hebel, Esq., San Francisco Police Officers' assn. (415) 861-0211, for Petitioner.

Lisa Berkowitz, Esq., Deputy San Francisco City Attorney, (415) 554-3825, for San Francisco Retirement Board.

RE: Plaintiff's Motion For Writ Of Mandamus Pursuant To Ccp Sec 1094.5.

Ruling is Argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the court adopts its tentative ruling. The court notes a section in the proposed order which the court intends to strike. Counsel is instructed to meet and confer re the section of the proposed order stricken by the court.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After hearing, an order is signed.

Notice Of Motion For Writ Of Mandamus Pursuant To Ccp Sec 1094.5
Off Calendar Sep-26-2023 Continued To Oct-03-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER JUSTIN WEBSTER'S Motion For Writ Of Mandamus Pursuant To Ccp Sec 1094.5.

Continued to October 3, 2023, on the court's motion.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
